visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black off-the-shoulder top and a choker, stands in a brightly lit retail aisle holding a large Lego box. The box features the Disney Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs Cottage. The background shows stacks of colorful plush toys and yellow price tags. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of the Lego box. A hand points at the various mini-figures of the seven dwarfs positioned in front of the brick-built house. The lighting is even and typical of a large warehouse store. (3) The woman rotates the box to display the reverse side, showing internal room details of the cottage. She points to a brick-built well and a tree feature on the packaging. The environment remains busy with merchandise visible in the periphery. (4) Close-up views of the box highlights details like a glass coffin and the Wicked Queen. The woman's hands gesture towards these specific elements to emphasize the set's play features. (5) The woman returns to a medium shot, smiling at the camera while holding the box upright. She appears enthusiastic, standing amidst the toy section of the warehouse as she concludes her presentation of the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 太便宜不買可惜. [Variety]: 黑五好康. [Variety]: 迪士尼超大白雪公主樂高. (2) [Logo]: LEGO. [Subtitle]: 43242. [Subtitle]: 2228 pcs. (3) [Subtitle]: $4699 -> $3500.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long black hair, wearing a black off-the-shoulder top and a black choker.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The interior of a Costco warehouse, specifically the toy and seasonal aisle, filled with plush characters and Lego sets on shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with an energetic female voice greeting the audience over a fast-paced synth-pop background track. A male voice quickly joins, speaking with a very high pitch variability and rapid delivery, creating a sense of urgency. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies a visual cut as the male narrator describes the specific Lego set and its Black Friday price. The music maintains a steady, driving beat with clear percussive hits. (3) The male narrator's volume increases as he points out specific features like the 'Prince' and 'Witch' figures. A subtle digital 'ding' effect marks the display of the discounted price on screen. (4) Both voices overlap briefly as they express excitement about the value of the product. The background music continues without interruption, keeping the energy high until the final cut. The recording is very clean with minimal environmental interference.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Price Reveal -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional showcase for a specific Lego Disney set sold at Costco during the Black Friday sales period. By using enthusiastic narration, upbeat music, and detailed close-ups of the set's components and figures, the content emphasizes the aesthetic appeal and the significant price discount to motivate viewers to shop at Costco.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creators are specifically showcasing a product (Lego set) while standing in a Costco, mentioning the Costco name, and showing the Black Friday sale price.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a typical social-media shopping vlog that leverages retail environment branding (Costco) and high-energy voiceovers to capture attention.
